document_id: Corporate Tax Private Letter Ruling CPLR 2015-12

findings.evidence: The PDF contains multiple prominent black redaction blocks indicating an address block, a 'Re:' subject line, a 'Dear:' salutation, and inline client names. In the HTML, these graphical blocks are completely missing, resulting in awkward text gaps such as 'Dear :'.
The PDF features a black redaction block at the top left of the header area, preceding the date. This graphical block is entirely absent in the HTML rendering.

The PDF contains a cluster of black redaction rectangles at the bottom right, serving as a placeholder for the signature and sender details. The HTML completely omits these graphics, ending the document abruptly after 'Very truly yours,'.
